title: Before the Queen Elizabeth II Cup

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having been encouraged by Sweep Tosho's
efforts, Zenno Rob Roy wins the autumn Tenno
Sho and declares that she'll conquer the
upcoming Japan Cup too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Sweep Tosho forces me to decide
which race will serve as the stage for her contest
against the Triple Crown tour runners.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But which race would make a grand enough stage
for her to cast her magic on the whole world? The
answer will depend on how the Queen Elizabeth II
Cup plays out today.
